# Panstellia robots.txt
# Allow search engine crawlers to index the site

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /cart
Disallow: /.well-known/

# Specific rules for Googlebot
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

# Specific rules for Bingbot
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Crawl delay for all bots
Crawl-delay: 0.5

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://panstellia.com/sitemap.xml
